tldr: Two of your four live ads are exact duplicates (Ads #4 and #5 both run the LIGHTSUM drop with identical copy), and Ads #2 and #3 share word-for-word body copy — meaning 4 of 4 primary ads are running near-identical text. Expect CPM creep within 7–10 days as Meta's auction recognizes the redundancy.

benchmark.context: Fashion jewelry brands typically refresh creative every 22 days. OHTNYC is running duplicated body copy across the entire primary set, pulling the fatigue curve forward by roughly half.

ads.headline: Layered to perfection
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Body copy is 100% identical to Ad #3 — only the headline differs
'Be unapologetically you' is generic empowerment language with no product specificity
No price, drop name, or scarcity hook to refresh attention

ads.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Same body as Ad #2 AND points to the same LP (transparent-heart-charm-necklace) — Meta will deprioritize one
Headline 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' is a use-case angle that the body copy never reinforces
Zero differentiation from Ad #2 in the auction — they are cannibalizing each other

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Identical copy to Ad #5 — only the LP product differs (cube-dice vs supernova necklace)
Strong narrative hook ('main character era', 'limited drop') gives it more runway than Ads #2/3
Collab equity (LIGHTSUM/CUBE) carries this further but duplicate body still triggers auction overlap

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Same copy as Ad #4 but routed to supernova-necklace LP — better LP/product match likely lifts CVR
'Limited drop' urgency is the only scarcity lever in your entire rotation
Collab credibility (LIGHTSUM) is the strongest hook OHTNYC is currently running

ads_compact.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads_compact.body: Not the jewelry you save for 'someday.' The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between.

ads_compact.headline: Steal Hearts with He♡rt Heist
ads_compact.body: He♡rt Heist blends romance with edge: crystal-lit hearts, love-locked chains, surgical steel that shines.

ads_compact.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads_compact.body: Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage.

ad_to_scale.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ad_to_scale.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage.
ad_to_scale.why: This is the only ad in rotation with a real narrative hook — collab equity (LIGHTSUM x CUBE), scarcity ('limited drop'), and identity ('main character era'). The supernova-necklace LP also pairs better with the 'cosmos' framing than the cube-dice version. Push budget here while the collab heat is fresh and pause Ad #4 to stop the duplicate-copy auction overlap.

ad_to_kill.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ad_to_kill.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
ad_to_kill.why: Ad #3 runs identical body copy to Ad #2 AND points to the exact same product page (transparent-heart-charm-necklace). The 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' headline promises a use-case angle the body never delivers on, so neither headline test is being read cleanly. Kill this one, keep Ad #2, and rebuild the rotation angle as its own concept.

concepts.format: Video / 22s vertical, founder talking-head + product B-roll
concepts.hook: We made jewelry that doesn't ask permission.
concepts.primary_text: OHT was never about pretty. It's about pieces that don't care who you are — they just want to be worn. Surgical steel, sharp lines, soft enough for grocery runs and bold enough for the stage. ☁︎⚙︎☆ No 'men's' rack, no 'women's' rack — just oht. Tap to see what your rotation's been missing. ✧˖°
concepts.visual_direction: Founder in NYC studio, hands-on with pieces, cuts to diverse models (all genders) wearing the same necklace differently
concepts.fills_gap: Zero founder/brand-story content in current rotation — every ad is product-led with no human voice

concepts.format: Carousel / 5 cards, one per day-of-week look
concepts.primary_text: Mon: layered hearts under a hoodie. Wed: stacked rings, coffee-run energy. Fri: He♡rt Heist + Cube Dice, going-out armor. ♡⊹˚₊ The whole point of OHT is you don't take it off — you rotate it. Built to live in, not save for someday. Tap through to build your week. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
concepts.visual_direction: 5 flat-lay or on-body shots, each labeled with day + vibe, mixing transparent heart, cube dice, and He♡rt Heist pieces
concepts.fills_gap: Ad #3 promised a 'Weekly Rotation' angle but never delivered on it — this concept actually executes that idea

concepts.hook: I wasn't going to film this but —
concepts.primary_text: Real customer, real reaction. She opened the He♡rt Heist box and said 'this is heavier than I expected' — that's the OHT difference. Surgical steel, crystal-lit hearts, weight you can feel. ☁︎♡☁︎ Not the jewelry you save for someday. The kind you wear out the door, same day. Catch feelings → ✧˖°
concepts.visual_direction: Phone-shot UGC unboxing, close-up on weight/finish, ends on customer wearing it out the door
concepts.fills_gap: No social proof, no UGC, no customer voice anywhere in current rotation — every ad is brand-voice product copy

unlocks: Stop Ads #2 and #3 from cannibalizing each other in the same auction (same body, same LP)
Recover ~9–14 days of creative runway by replacing duplicate LIGHTSUM copy with one variant per LP
Add the first founder/UGC angles to the account — currently 0% of spend is on non-product creative
Convert the 'Weekly Rotation' headline promise into an actual carousel that delivers on it

next_step.urgency: Ad #3 hits fatigue in ~6 days. Ads #2, #4, #5 follow within 16.
next_step.headline: Let's rebuild the rotation before CPMs spike
next_step.body: 30 minutes to walk through which ad to scale, which to cut today, and the 3 concepts that fill the founder/UGC/use-case gaps. You'll leave with a shoot list, not just notes.

method_note: Scoring uses live Meta Ad Library copy + duplicate detection across primary and additional ad sets; impression-level data not available, so fatigue dates are directional estimates based on copy redundancy and angle saturation.
